outlook.summary: Positive Total GEX across all major expiries indicates a stable market environment where dealers are long gamma, actively suppressing volatility. The spot price is trapped in a tight intraday range between the massive 694 Put support and the 697-700 Call resistance zone. The 0DTE Gamma Flip at 697.86 serves as the critical directional pivot. A pronounced bearish volatility skew indicates underlying hedging demand for puts, reinforcing structural support levels.
